query:
-- All billing items grouped by billingPlatform (empty string = Xero/SasBoss/ChannelHaus)
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN billingPlatform = '' OR billingPlatform IS NULL THEN 'Xero/SasBoss/ChannelHaus' ELSE billingPlatform END as platform,
  COUNT(*) as totalItems,
  SUM(CASE WHEN matchStatus = 'matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as matched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN matchStatus = 'unmatched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unmatched,
  COUNT(DISTINCT serviceExternalId) as servicesLinked
FROM billing_items
GROUP BY CASE WHEN billingPlatform = '' OR billingPlatform IS NULL THEN 'Xero/SasBoss/ChannelHaus' ELSE billingPlatform END;
